name: Urgency optimization on frozen read-tagged snapshot

description: Bootstrap control: ModernBERT-base transformer, max_length=512, text_prep=title_head, balance=full on frozen read-tagged snapshot. Established first urgency baseline with AP 0.8708, log_loss 0.6379, peak_vram 4.84 GB.

Required run 2: ModernBERT-base transformer, max_length=512, text_prep=single_blob, balance=full. AP fell slightly vs control (0.8696 < 0.8708) and log_loss worsened materially (0.6802 vs 0.6379), with slower training and much lower recall.

Required run 3: distilbert-base-uncased transformer, max_length=512, text_prep=title_head, balance=full. Runtime and VRAM improved sharply and log_loss slightly improved, but AP dropped to 0.8652 vs the ModernBERT control 0.8708, so discard on primary metric.

Required run 4: embeddinggemma-300m frozen embeddings with logistic regression, max_length=2048, text_prep=title_head, balance=full. New best AP 0.8725, with better roc_auc, log_loss, accuracy, recall, F1, and lower VRAM than the ModernBERT control, though slower total runtime.

Required run 5: BAAI/bge-m3 frozen embeddings with logistic regression, max_length=2048, text_prep=title_head, balance=full. It edged the original ModernBERT control on AP but failed to beat the current embeddinggemma leader (0.8708 < 0.8725) while also being much slower than all prior runs.

Required run 6: gte-large-en-v1.5 frozen embeddings with logistic regression, max_length=2048, text_prep=title_head, pooling=cls, balance=full. New best AP 0.8745, narrowly beating embeddinggemma while also slightly improving log_loss and brier_score at similar VRAM, though total runtime is much longer.

Follow-up LINEAR_C sweep on the current gte-large-en-v1.5 leader: C=0.5 with cls pooling, title_head, embedding_linear. AP slipped from 0.8745 to 0.8733 and calibration worsened, so stronger regularization did not help.

Follow-up LINEAR_C sweep on the current gte-large-en-v1.5 leader: C=2.0 with cls pooling, title_head, embedding_linear. AP dropped sharply to 0.8689 even though log_loss, accuracy, recall, and F1 improved, so this setting changes the operating curve in an unfavorable way for the primary AP objective.

EmbeddingGemma follow-up LINEAR_C sweep: C=2.0 with mean pooling, title_head, embedding_linear. AP dropped below both the embeddinggemma baseline and the gte-large leader, despite better log_loss, accuracy, recall, F1, and brier_score, so this is not a keep for the AP objective.
